title: cattleya × cogniauxii
intro: Cattleya × cogniauxii, also known as the Cogniaux's Cattleya, is a hybrid orchid species obtained from the cross between Cattleya gaskelliana and Cattleya lueddemanniana. This plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Amazonian region, where its rhizomes have been utilized to treat various health issues. The medicinal properties of Cattleya × cogniauxii include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which contribute to its use in treating ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the rhizomes of Cattleya × cogniauxii are often made into teas or infusions, which are believed to offer relief from fever and respiratory issues.
